info.name: Finance Backend API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for Finance Data Processing and Access Control Backend.

## Setup
1. Set `baseUrl` variable to `http://localhost:3000`
2. Run **Auth / Register** or **Auth / Login (Admin)** first
3. The token is automatically saved to `authToken` variable
4. All protected routes use `authToken` automatically

## Test Flow
1. Login as Admin → get token
2. Register a new Viewer user
3. Promote Viewer to Analyst
4. Create financial records
5. Run dashboard queries

request.description: Check if the server and database are running correctly.

item.name: Auth
item.description: Authentication endpoints — register, login, logout, me

request.description: Register a new user. Default role is 'viewer'.
Should return 422 validation error with field-level details.
Login as seeded admin. Token is auto-saved to authToken variable.
Should return 401 with vague error message.
Get the currently authenticated user. Always fetches fresh from DB.
Should return 401 when no token is provided.
Clears the HttpOnly auth cookie.

item.name: Users
item.description: User management — admin only except GET single user

request.description: Admin only. Returns paginated list of all users.
Filter users by role and status.
Search users by name or email.
Admin can fetch any user. Viewers/analysts can only fetch themselves.
Should return 404 for non-existent user.

Admin only. Promote or demote a user's role.

Replace {{userId}} with a real user ID (not the admin's own ID).
Should return 422 validation error.

Admin only. Deactivate a user account.

Replace {{userId}} with a non-admin user ID.
Admin only. Reactivate a deactivated user.

Admin only. Hard deletes a user.

⚠️ Replace {{userId}} with a non-admin user ID.
Cannot delete the last admin account.

Should return 403 when a viewer or analyst tries to list all users.

Replace VIEWER_TOKEN_HERE with a viewer/analyst token.

item.name: Records
item.description: Financial records — CRUD with filters, sorting, pagination, soft delete

request.description: Create an income record. Requires analyst or admin role.
Create an expense record.
Create a freelance income record for February.
Create a food expense record.
Should return 422 with field-level validation errors.
List all records for the current user with pagination.
Filter records by type (income or expense).
Filter records by category.
Filter records by date range.
Sort records by amount descending.
Use all filters together: type, date range, sort, pagination.
Get a single record by ID. recordId is set automatically after creating a record.
Should return 400 for invalid ObjectId format.
Partially update a record. Only provided fields are updated.
Should return 422 — at least one field required for update.
Soft deletes a record — sets isDeleted=true, does not remove from DB.
After soft delete, fetching the record should return 404.

item.name: Dashboard
item.description: Aggregation endpoints — analyst and admin only (except recent)

request.description: Returns total income, expenses, net balance, and record counts.
Summary filtered to January 2025 only.
Returns category-wise totals with percentages, split into income and expense groups.
Category totals for Q1 2025.
Returns monthly income vs expense trends for the last 6 months.
Returns last 12 months of trends.
Trends for H1 2025.
Returns 10 most recent transactions. Available to all roles.
Returns last 5 transactions.

Viewers cannot access dashboard summary. Should return 403.

Replace VIEWER_TOKEN_HERE with a viewer's token.

item.name: RBAC Edge Cases
item.description: Tests that verify role-based access control is enforced correctly

request.description:
Viewers are read-only. Creating a record should return 403.

Replace VIEWER_TOKEN_HERE with a viewer's token.
Viewers cannot delete records. Should return 403.

Admin cannot delete their own account. Should return 400.

Make sure {{userId}} is set to the admin's own ID.

Admin cannot change their own role. Should return 400.

Make sure {{userId}} is set to the admin's own ID.
Should return 401 with INVALID_TOKEN error code.
